raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current scope check","name":"What's feeling most solid in your role right now, Ahmed?","description":"Opens with a calm read on where he feels grounded before moving into growth or concern.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Scope boundaries","name":"Where does your current scope still feel too small for the role you want?","description":"Surfaces the boundary between his present remit and the next-level scope he has in mind.","purpose":"topic","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next-level definition","name":"What does senior scope mean to you in practice?","description":"Forces a concrete definition of the next-level role instead of abstract ambition.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Role picture","name":"What kind of product leader do you want to be known as next?","description":"Elicits the identity and shape of the role he is aiming toward.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Trust gap","name":"Where does stakeholder trust feel thinnest for you right now?","description":"Gets him to name the relationships or contexts where influence is weakest.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Influence pattern","name":"What usually happens when you try to move a strategic conversation forward?","description":"Surfaces the interaction pattern that may be limiting his visibility or influence.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Executor mode","name":"Where are you still operating more like an executor than a strategic owner?","description":"Identifies the parts of his work that remain tactical when they may need broader ownership.","purpose":"competency","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Leverage tradeoff","name":"What would you have to stop doing to create more leverage in your week?","description":"Forces a trade-off between delivery habits and strategic leadership time.","purpose":"topic","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next move","name":"What is the first concrete move you want to make before we next meet?","description":"Closes on a specific commitment that advances the growth plan without opening a new topic.","purpose":"topic","stage":"commitment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
